qa_pairs.question: What types of changes are documented on this page regarding job submission?
qa_pairs.answer: This page documents changes to job scheduling policies that may impact the behaviour of job submission commands such as `sbatch`, `salloc`, and `srun`.

qa_pairs.question: When were the RAC 2026 accounts and sub-allocations activated for the Narval and Rorqual clusters?
qa_pairs.answer: The RAC 2026 accounts and sub-allocations for the Narval and Rorqual clusters were activated on 2026-04-07.

qa_pairs.question: What new requirements apply to GPU job requests on the Rorqual cluster as of April 17, 2026?
qa_pairs.answer: As of 2026-04-17, all GPU requests on the Rorqual cluster must specify a GPU model or an instance model. Furthermore, only one Multi-Instance GPU (MIG) instance may be requested at a time.
